overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a samurai character walking through a lush Japanese temple garden in spring. The character traverses stone paths past traditional pagodas, wooden pavilions, and mossy rock formations under bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden path lined with stone lanterns and jizo statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the five-story pagoda visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the left side of the path wearing white clothing

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with moss on the right side of the path
row of small stone Buddhist statues lining the right side of the path
tall traditional wooden pagoda with curved tiered roofs visible ahead
irregular stone slabs forming a walking path through the garden
large boulders covered in green moss flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone path through a lush temple garden, passing stone lanterns and jizo statues. A pedestrian in white clothing approaches from the opposite direction on the left, while a five-story pagoda looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden with large wooden pavilion structure

events.description: passing the five-story pagoda on the left and approaching the large wooden pavilion
walking underneath the raised wooden pavilion with large support pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing the pagoda and moving under the wooden pavilion structure

entered.detail: traditional wooden structure with large pillars and raised floor on the right side
flowering shrubs with purple blossoms visible on the left

segments.scene_description: The character passes the pagoda on the left and approaches a large wooden pavilion with massive support pillars. The path leads under the pavilion structure, with flowering azaleas visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: lush garden corridor with curated shrubs and stone features

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden past various stone lanterns and landscaped vegetation

entered.detail: wooden temple structure with tiled roof visible through the trees on the left
large rock formation covered in moss on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Past the pavilion, the character continues along the winding stone path through a densely vegetated garden section. A traditional temple building becomes visible through the trees on the left, while large mossy boulders line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky garden section with scattered trees and boulders

events.description: path opens into rockier terrain with larger boulders and more sparse tree coverage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding stone path through the rockier section of the garden toward denser forest

entered.detail: large weathered rock formations on the right side of the path
tree with yellow-green foliage standing prominently ahead

segments.scene_description: The garden opens into a rockier section with larger boulders and sparse tree coverage. The path continues toward a denser forest area in the distance, with rock formations now flanking both sides of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a manicured temple garden that gradually transitions into a rugged, rocky forest trail. It begins with the character walking along a stone path past lanterns and jizo statues, passing a pedestrian in white as a five-story pagoda looms in the distance. As the camera moves past the pagoda, the scene shifts toward a large wooden pavilion with massive support pillars and vibrant flowering azaleas. The path then winds through a densely vegetated section where a traditional temple building appears through the trees and mossy boulders line the right side. Finally, the garden opens into a rockier landscape with sparse tree coverage, leading the character toward a dense forest flanked by large rock formations.
